text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)
Thanks Mark, yes I am using All not all, sorry for the typo , still the following error

"404 Not Found
nginx"

Also please note the download is initiated by PKG install as part of the xorg installation and it is automated download, yet the download stops on this file and return the error Can't assign requested address and exit the installation, other files where downloaded ok.
Also, when using the below URl manually through a browser,it is showing all the files and when selecting any of the files the download windows opens, only when selecting smproxy-1.0.6.txz the above error comes, I have just tried it again , same error

http://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:11:i386/quarterly/All/

thanks
